title: A Bonnie Odyssey
short_description: A retrofuturist puzzle mystery set on an enigmatic abandoned island in the Scottish wilds.
description: A Bonnie Odyssey is a retrofuturist puzzle mystery where you'll explore an enigmatic abandoned island. This open world sci-fi adventure in the Scottish wilds tells the tale of a father and daughter separated by time, unravel the secrets of your past, and meet odd little friends along the way.
